authors: Daniel O’Brien Christian Zabel Frank Lobigs a Schmalenbach School of Business and Economics
Technische Hochschule Köln (University of Applied Sciences Cologne)
Technische Universität Dortmund (Technical University of Dortmund)
raw_title: Consumer Preferences and Willingness to Pay for Digital Journalism in Intermedia Competition: A Conjoint Analysis of Online News Users in the Austrian Market
title_en: Consumer Preferences and Willingness to Pay for Digital Journalism in Intermedia Competition: A Conjoint Analysis of Online News Users in the Austrian Market
title_zh: 媒介竞争中的消费者偏好与数字新闻付费意愿：奥地利市场在线新闻用户的联合分析
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究调查了奥地利在线新闻用户对数字新闻的偏好和付费意愿，特别是在不同媒体竞争的情况下。研究人员使用了一种叫做联合分析的方法，了解用户在选择新闻服务时最看重哪些因素，以及他们愿意为哪些功能付费。
plain_summary_en: This study examines Austrian online news users' preferences and willingness to pay for digital journalism, particularly in the context of intermedia competition. Researchers used a method called conjoint analysis to understand which factors users value most when choosing news services and what features they're willing to pay for.
research_direction_zh: 数字新闻商业模式与消费者行为研究，关注媒介竞争环境下用户付费意愿的影响因素。
research_direction_en: Research on digital journalism business models and consumer behavior, focusing on factors influencing user willingness to pay in competitive media environments.
